cards.front: What does the -R option stand for when changing file permissions in UNIX?
What is the effect of using the -R option with the chmod command?
cards.back: Changes the permissions for all files and directories within the specified directory

cards.front: What is the purpose of the -R option with the chmod command and the find command?
cards.back: To change the permissions for all files and directories within a directory hierarchy

cards.front: What is the syntax for recursively changing file permissions using the chmod command?
What is the purpose of the -R option with the chmod and chgrp commands?
cards.back: To change the permissions for all files and directories within a directory hierarchy, including group permissions
